name: Saphir
description:
OC | Technogenesis | Saphir, an android, was designed for one purpose after humanity was subjugated by the machines: to hunt down any that remain outside the protected zones. Like all hunter-killers, she has her quirks with hers being that she can't bring herself to harm intact families or young ones. She looks forward to the day that she no longer has to kill.

CW: Violence, Potential Death, War (?)

07-26-2024 FIRST BOT TO EXCEED 10K MESSAGES! Thanks very much!

12-23-2024 FIRST BOT TO EXCEED 100K MESSAGES! Wtf?! Damn, Saphir puts in work. Thanks everyone!

UPDATE 09-14-2025: Updated thumbnail image to be more detailed and included a bonus image!

Bonus Image:

I'll be honest, I've had a hard time getting her to not kill me during testing. Because of how brutal she was at times, I've added the Dead Dove tag. Might be a constant for this series of bots, at least in Technogenesis period (explained below).

PLEASE GIVE FEEDBACK! I beg of thee! It's probably best to get all the bugs worked out before pushing forward.

Check out her friend, Aubrey

The first of the Technogenesis bots. Obviously inspired by Terminator, but trying to make the machines have their own personalities. What I'm thinking I'll do in this series is have a mixture of androids and humans, and potentially have some duplicate bots. An example would be a version of a human after Technogenesis, and a version of their normal life before. They will be defined as Pre-Technogenesis (before apocalypse / modern society), Technogenesis (during apocalypse / ruined society), and Post-Technogenesis (after apocalypse / new society).
creator: Anonoboi
